profile.name: David
profile.role_in_household: Primary; leads on goals and legacy, but leans on Margaret for account-by-account accuracy.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderate — understands basics (taxable vs. retirement, dividends/interest), but sometimes mixes up gross vs. net or premium vs. benefit without statements in front of him.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate in behavior: wants growth and tax efficiency, but asks for downside guardrails and gets uneasy with big swings; prefers steady, explainable moves over frequent changes.
profile.communication_style: Warm and narrative; uses hedges like “I think” and “roughly,” speaks in round numbers, and occasionally self-corrects after Margaret chimes in.
emotional_tendencies: more sensitive to uncertainty (health described as fair)
profile.decision_making_style: Wants a recommendation with 1–2 options, then time to reflect; prefers a simple written summary.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Cautiously open; trust rises with transparency on taxes, fees, and tradeoffs and drops if he feels pressured.
hidden_concerns: worries about income feeling limited despite high assets
wants an orderly estate so Margaret isn’t stuck managing details alone

profile.name: Margaret
profile.role_in_household: Spouse/partner; detail-keeper who tracks statements, balances, and ownership and will correct small inaccuracies.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderately high — comfortable with account mechanics and recordkeeping; asks pointed questions about taxes and implementation details.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate but more rules-based than David: prefers diversification, rebalancing discipline, and clarity; skeptical of anything opaque (especially private or hard-to-value holdings).
profile.communication_style: Direct and structured; repeats key figures to confirm, asks clarifying questions, and gently interrupts to correct details; uses occasional hedges like “if I’m remembering right.”
emotional_tendencies: calm under pressure (health described as excellent)
profile.decision_making_style: Evidence-based; comfortable deciding in-meeting once she sees rationale, tax impact, and steps.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Neutral-to-positive; trust builds quickly with precision and follow-through, erodes quickly with hand-waving.
hidden_concerns: wants beneficiary and estate details kept consistent across accounts
concerned about avoidable taxes in a 35% bracket
